title: M.A.D. (Mutually Assured Destruction)
description: modpack that includes technology, exploration, quality of life improvements, and much more, but focused in war with "vanilla style" combat!
body:
M.A.D. (Mutually Assured Destruction) is a Minecraft modpack that includes technology, exploration, quality of life improvements, and much more, but focused in war with "vanilla style" combat!
Adding mods like [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create), [Oritech](https://modrinth.com/mod/oritech), [Stellaris](https://modrinth.com/mod/stellaris) and other mods to battle with your friends, ensuring a genuine TECHNICAL WAR.
